notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.

landing.badge: A job portal that also builds your career path

hero.subtitle: Still searching after years of applications? Every skill you list opens three doors — a job, a partnership with a growing startup, or a community role that builds real-world experience.

paths.heading: Three paths, one profile
paths.subtitle: Your resume works across all three — every skill you build counts toward the role you actually want.

jobs.title: Full-time & contract jobs
jobs.description: Search thousands of roles from direct employers, plus listings aggregated from other job boards across the web.

partnerships.title: Startup partnerships
partnerships.description: Not landing the job yet? Partner with a startup that needs your exact skill set and turn it into real, countable experience.

community.title: Community opportunities
community.description: Sharpen soft skills through community roles, and learn how different income types can support you along the way.

community.heading: Never heard of community income?
community.subtitle: Watch short videos and read guides on different income types — then tell us you're interested and we'll invite you to the next session.

finalCta.heading: Ready to build the career you actually want?
finalCta.subtitle: Create your profile once — it works across jobs, partnerships, and community roles.

startYourSearch.title: Start your search
startYourSearch.description: Enter a job title, skill, or keyword above — we'll surface matching jobs.

jobSearch.noResults: No jobs match your filters. Try clearing some filters or searching a different keyword.

notFound.title: Job not found
notFound.description: This posting may have been removed or the link is incorrect.

sidebar.partnerHeading: Partner with a startup in this space
sidebar.partnerBody: Startups on OpenOpportunity are looking for partners with similar skills — real product, counts as experience.
sidebar.mentorBody: Practice technical communication with peers weekly — useful for interviews like this one.

hero.title: Turn a startup's needs into your next career move
hero.subtitle: There's no list of open roles here yet — this is where you learn how partnerships work, then choose the track that fits: startups with funding to offer, or early-stage ones offering pure experience.

videoModal.caption: [ video: how startup partnerships work · 3 min ]

share.title: Share your profile
share.desc: Resume, skills, life goals, and the values that matter to you.

matched.title: Get matched
matched.desc: We surface startups whose needs fit your skill set.

seminar.title: Seminar or meetup
seminar.desc: Meet the founders through an invited session.

partner.title: Partner & build experience
partner.desc: Work together and document it for your resume.

cta.heading: Want us to notify you?
cta.body: Show interest and we'll notify you the moment a matching partnership opens up.
cta.thanks: Thanks — we'll notify you when a matching partnership opens ✓

hero.title: Understand income beyond a paycheck
hero.subtitle: Community roles build soft skills and introduce you to income types you may never have considered — while you keep searching for the job you want.
hero.videoCaption: [ video: what is community income? · 4 min ]
hero.knowMore: Know more about community & community income

active.title: Active income
active.desc: Trading time and skill directly for pay — most jobs work this way.

community.title: Community income
community.desc: Value created and shared through collective, local contribution.

passive.title: Passive income
passive.desc: Income that continues with limited ongoing active effort.

partnership.title: Partnership income
partnership.desc: Value earned by co-building and sharing outcomes with a team.
